(1) These Rules maybe called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force with effect from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2 In Schedule rv to the Passports Rules, 1980,- (a) for serial numbers 17 to 21 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- Out ofturn (Tatkaal) Passport : 17. Issue of fresh out of turn (Tatkaal) passport within 1-07 calendar days of the date of . application 18. Issue of fresh out of turn (Tatkaal) passports within 08·14 calendar days of the date of application • 19.. Issue of put of turn' (Tatkaal) passport in lieu oflost/dani~ged passport within 1·07 calendar days of the date of ajpplication 2D. Issue of out of turn (Tatkaal) passport in lieu of lost/damaged passport within 8·14 calendar days of the date of application 21. In all re-issue cases after expiry of ten/twenty years validity, either issued from:same PIA or any other PIA. where passport is to be re- issued out of turn (Tatkaal) within 1-3 working days from the date of application. Rs. 1500 plus the passport fee as applicable Rs. 1000 plus the passport fee as applicable Rs. 2500 plus the passport fee payable for getting a passport in lieu o.f lost/damaged passport Rs.1500 plus the passport fee payable for getting a passport in lieu of lost/damaged passport Rs. 1500 plus the passport fee as applicable Rs. 3750 plus the passport fee as applicable Rs. 2250 plus the passport fee as applicable No fee in addition to the' . passport fee payable for getting a passport in lieu of lost/damaged passport No fee in addition to the passport fee payable for getting a passport in lieu of lost/damaged passport Rs. 3750 plus the passport fee as applicable -- 3 of 4 -- rna GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY 4 Note: (A) Only passport fee as applicable would be payable for grant of an Out-of Turn (Tatkaal) Passport covered under Serial No. 17. ] 8, 19,20 and 21 in the following cases, namely: (i) The applicant has been advised to go abroad for specialized medical treatment and consultation. (ii) The attendant (one only) who would need 10 accompany the applicant referred to at (i) above. (iii) In case of death abroad of spouse, father, mother, child, child's spouse, grand child, brother or his spouse, and sister or her spouse of the applicant. (iv) AJI Diplomatic/Official passport holders who apply for an ordinary passport in lieu of their Diplomatic/Official passport. (v) The applicants who are orphans and are being adopted by foreign parents. Note: (H) In all miscellaneous services. except ECNR, where fresh passport booklet is to be issued. (Tatkaal) fees will he applicable. Note: (C) 1\0 proof of urgency is required from applicant for grant of an Out-of-Turn (Tatkaal) passport. Hence, PIA would nOI insist fur the same in any form. lF.
